title: Device ping in restricted anchorage zone
detail: Mobile device ADID-0091-XX pinged cell tower QSH-14 within 400m of prohibited anchorage. No legitimate vessel at location.

title: Ad profile linked to sanctioned entity
detail: ADID-8821-IR ad targeting profile associated with Sepehr Energy Co., listed on OFAC SDN list (2025-11-12). Device last seen aboard IRAN MELODY.

title: Telegram chatter — STS transfer coordination
detail: Monitored Telegram channel (ID: 1882334410) referenced 'DT arrival + cargo split' at coordinates matching DARK TIDE current position. Three unknown devices in proximity.

title: Device colocation: DARK TIDE + known broker
detail: ADID-6643-PA and ADID-9977-XX (known petroleum broker, sanctioned) pinged same tower within 12-minute window. High confidence physical meeting.

title: Anomalous app usage pattern
detail: ADID-5509-CN showing encrypted comms app (non-commercial) usage pattern consistent with crew receiving non-standard cargo loading orders.

title: Shipping forum post: CASPIAN WIND buyer sought
detail: Russian-language forum MarineRu (archived) posted asking for direct buyer for CASPIAN WIND cargo. Post deleted after 8 minutes. Screenshot retained.

title: Device entered Oman EEZ from Iranian waters
detail: ADID-1182-RU geofence crossing detected: entered Oman EEZ at 07:44Z from coordinates consistent with Iranian territorial waters. Pattern matches prior CASPIAN WIND voyages.

title: HUMINT: IRGC logistics vessel confirmed
detail: Source GOLF-7 reports SHADOW RUNNER is a modified IRGC logistics platform, recently repainted. Hull ID matches vessel seized by UAE Coast Guard in 2023 (released 2024).

title: Route deviation — device location mismatch
detail: ADID-3317-GR last pinged tower 14nm south of filed route. AIS position and device location diverging slowly. Possible minor course correction or monitoring gap.

title: Device offline gap — 6h dark period
detail: ADID-8821-IR went offline at 01:18Z, reappeared at 07:22Z. 6-hour gap consistent with device powered off during AIS-dark transit through Iranian waters.

title: X/Twitter: photo of unmarked vessel at Bandar Abbas
detail: Open-source post (now deleted, archived) shows a vessel matching IRAN MELODY profile at Bandar Abbas dry dock on 04-13. Different hull markings visible.

title: Bulk SMS campaign: coordinates transmitted
detail: ADID-0091-XX device associated with bulk SMS burst to 6 numbers. Message content not intercepted but timing correlates with vessel arrival at current position.
